title: Beautiful and practical
content: Our corgi eats slower and the bowl looks sculptural on the counter.

title: Heavy in a good way
content: Feels premium and does not slide around.

title: Cat approved instantly
content: The basket blends into our living room and our cat moved in on day one.

title: Looks editorial
content: Exactly the calm aesthetic I wanted for our home.

title: Quiet operation
content: Much quieter than our old fountain and simple to clean.

title: Worth it
content: Both pets drink more water now.

title: Sturdy rope
content: Holding up well after a week of tug sessions.

title: Gentle on fur
content: Soft enough for our rabbit and easy to grip.

title: Natural texture
content: Looks far better than plastic hides in our terrarium.
